name: chr19_19q11_pericentric_inversion
description: 19q11 pericentric region — common polymorphic pericentric inversion site of chromosome 19. Flanked by very large SD-rich blocks shared with 19p12, dense with KRAB-ZNF paralogs; site of frequent assembly collapse in GRCh38 (partially resolved in CHM13).

architecture.internal_structure: Inverted SD pairs (~100-300 kb) at >99% identity flanking the pericentric region; ZNF/centromere transition zone with abundant alpha-satellite remnants; T2T-CHM13 resolves most of the gap.
